name: FutuRe Americas Insurance
description: Americas primary insurance and reinsurance operations

content.name: FutuRe Americas Insurance
content.description:
Americas insurance and reinsurance operations covering North and South American markets. Headquartered in New York with offices in Miami, Chicago, and Sao Paulo.

**Data Products:**
- [Local Lines of Business](/FutuRe/AmericasIns/LineOfBusiness) — 8 LoBs in USD
- [Analysis Cube](/FutuRe/AmericasIns/Analysis/AnnualReport) — Local P&L aggregation
- [Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/AmericasIns/TransactionMapping/MappingRules) — Maps local LoBs to 10 Group LoBs

**Data Flow:** Cashflows → Lines of Business → Analysis Cube → [Transaction Mapping](/FutuRe/TransactionMapping) → Group Consolidation
